title: Ferrari Luce — first fully electric GT concept test

stimulus.description: Ferrari has launched the Ferrari Luce, its first fully electric GT. The car is a five-seat, four-door Ferrari with a new exterior and interior design.

treatments.neutral: Ferrari has launched the Ferrari Luce, its first fully electric GT. The car is a five-seat, four-door Ferrari with a new exterior and interior design.
treatments.heritage: Ferrari has launched the Ferrari Luce, its first fully electric GT. Ferrari presents it as a new chapter in the Prancing Horse lineage, focused on Italian craft, driving emotion, and grand touring performance.

questions.text: How well does this car fit what the Ferrari brand means to you?
How much excitement or desire does this car stir in you?
How much would the absence of a roaring engine — the sound and feel of a traditional Ferrari — diminish this car for you?
How strong a statement of status and success would owning this car make?
Bottom line: does this feel like a real Ferrari to you?
What is your honest first reaction to this car?
What is the strongest argument against this car, from your point of view?
